headline: Chef José Andrés: Restaurants closures are coming if inflation doesn't get under control
summary: World renowned chef Jose Andres strikes a cautious tone on the outlook for restaurants because of inflation.

raw.headline: Chef José Andrés: Restaurants closures are coming if inflation doesn't get under control

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Lowers Price Target to $44
summary: Citigroup  analyst Jon Tower   maintains Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $49 to $44.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Lowers Price Target to $44

headline: Chipotle launches upgraded rewards program
summary: Rewards programs can be a bit of a double-edged sword. On the one hand, when executed well, they can go a long way in bringing in repeat business. Some 47% of customers report using loyalty programs multiple times a month, according to a report from Deloitte. On the other hand, when they ...
